# True Path Digital

> True Path Digital helps owner-operated local service businesses find and fix the gaps between their marketing visibility, customer trust, lead response systems, and booked work.

## About

True Path Digital is a consulting practice based in Missoula, Montana, founded by Trevor Riggs. It works exclusively with owner-operated local service businesses — trade contractors, HVAC companies, plumbers, electricians, roofers, custom builders, and similar field-service operators.

The business does not sell generic marketing retainers. It diagnoses specific problems in a company's marketing, website, Google visibility, and lead handling — then provides focused implementation to fix them.

## Contact

- Website: https://truepathdigital.com
- Email: trevor@truepathdigital.com
- Phone: +1-406-880-6992
- Location: Missoula, Montana

## Services

### Google Business Profile Optimization
URL: https://truepathdigital.com/services/google-profile
I help local service businesses clean up, strengthen, and better manage their Google Business Profiles so they appear in Google Maps results and convert more local searches into phone calls.

### Website Design and Conversion Repair
URL: https://truepathdigital.com/services/website-builds
I build and repair websites for local service businesses that turn more visitors into calls, estimates, and booked work. No templates. No filler pages. Every page exists to solve a real business problem.

### Lead Response and Follow-Up Systems
URL: https://truepathdigital.com/services/lead-response
I help local service businesses build simple lead response and follow-up systems so inquiries are acknowledged, tracked, assigned, and followed up — without adding unnecessary software or administrative work.

## Diagnostic Service

### The Demand Leak Audit ($750)
A structured diagnostic review of a service business's website, Google Business Profile, online reputation, local search visibility, and lead response process. The audit identifies where the business is losing potential customers and provides prioritized, actionable recommendations.
